ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "base_unit" TEXT /* Base cryptocurrency unit being traded */,
  "quote_unit" TEXT /* Quote cryptocurrency unit for the trading pair */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the trading pair in the interval */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the trading pair in the interval */,
  "last" REAL /* Last traded price of the trading pair */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., SPOT) */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the trading pair */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume traded in the interval */,
  "sell" REAL /* Last selling price of the trading pair */,
  "buy" REAL /* Last buying price of the trading pair */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading pair */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of trading data */,
  "trading_time" TEXT /* Time of trading data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the data */,
  "volume_quote" REAL /* Volume in the quote currency */,
  "volume_base" REAL /* Volume in the base currency */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades in the interval */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest bid price */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest ask price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for notifications and authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for two-factor authentication */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry related to the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the trade */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry related to the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., limit, market) */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Price at which the order is set */,
  "order_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "stop_price" REAL /* Stop price for the order (if applicable) */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the order (if applicable) */,
  "expire_time" TEXT /* Time when the order will expire */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the order (e.g., stop loss, take profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wallet */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Type of cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the cryptocurrency in the wallet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wallet was created */,
  "last_transaction" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last transaction in the wallet */,
  "withdrawal_limit" REAL /* Daily withdrawal limit for the wallet */,
  "deposit_limit" REAL /* Daily deposit limit for the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., trade, market update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry related to the analysis */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Moving average calculated for the trading pair */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measurement for the trading pair */,
  "momentum" REAL /* Momentum indicator for the trading pair */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence */,
  "bollinger_bands" TEXT /* Bollinger Bands data (upper, middle, lower) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login, trade execution) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The API key string for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the API key was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* The permissions associated with the API key (e.g., read, write, trade) */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Last time the API key was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
